Double strike, trample

card.flavor: Do the right thing—or the wrong thing.

oracleCard.text:
Choose one —
• Disarm — Destroy target artifact. Create four Treasure tokens.
• Detonate — Megaton's Fate deals 8 damage to each creature. Each player gets four rad counters.

card.flavor: The appearance of large beasts from faraway lands remains a debate between animalfolk communities.

"One scratch on a wall meant safe passage, two that the target had already been raided, and three warned of a trap."
—*Weaponry of Kamigawa*

card.flavor: Together, they're greater than the sum of their rap sheets.

oracleCard.name: Trouble in Pairs

If an opponent would begin an extra turn, that player skips that turn instead.

edition.editionname: March of the Machine: The Aftermath

card.flavor: Danitha had spent her whole life preparing to lead House Capashen, but she mourned that the opportunity had come so soon.
